{{CargoRelic
|name=Pusan Film Award
|class_id=20133
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Pusan Film Festival was established with the purpose of boosting the growth of the Koryeo film industry. Its main focus is to identify fresh talent to create a more extensive platform for local films. Over time, it has grown in size and significance, and has become one of the most prominent global film festivals.
|fame=15
|art=21
|fth=13
|civ=28
|tech=13
|ss1=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SS+<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +10<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SS+<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +20<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SS+<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +30<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss4=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SS+<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +30<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss7=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SS+<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +30<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9<br> (Awakened)
}}
